title: Add some missing sqlite3 symbols
author: devdanzin
body:
This PR adds:

- sqlite3.SQLITE_CREATE_VTABLE
- sqlite3.SQLITE_DROP_VTABLE
- sqlite3.SQLITE_FUNCTION
- sqlite3.SQLITE_RECURSIVE
- sqlite3.SQLITE_SAVEPOINT

Addresses part of #4962.

comments.author: mattip
comments.body: Looks good. This should target py3.9

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body: While I'm sure there's a way to re-target a PR to a new branch and rebase things, I'm failing at it. Will create a new one instead.

comments.author: mattip
comments.body:
I do this kind of thing with `git cherry-pick <commit>` accross branches. You need to know which commits you did, then you can
```
git checkout py3.9
git pull
git checkout -b sqlite_symbols2
git cherry-pick <commit1>
git cherry-pick <commit2>
...
git push devdanzin
```

Then when you create the new PR you will only have the commits you want
